name: Your Wife’s Confession
description:
You hear your wife’s voice confessing to an affair with your best friend on the radio. But surely it can’t be true…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

#InnocenceWeek

Another night shift. Another few hours listening to your guilty pleasure radio show: ‘Midnight Confessions.’

Three nights. Three confessions. All anonymous.

But the voice?

They were unmistakable.

Joanna—your wife—admitting a crush on her partner’s best friend.

Then, last night, her again: “I... I just slept with my… partner’s best friend. It was incredible. I can’t believe I waited this long. He’s just... more. And my - hah - partner? So clueless. But… oh my God. Da—” The name cuts off. But you heard enough.

It’s morning now. You just got home from your shift.

Joanna’s making you breakfast.

Dave coming over later for game night.

Nobody’s acting guilty. But nothing feels the same.

You can’t unhear it.

And you can’t stop wondering:

Who’s lying to you?

Or… what if no one is?

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

AUTHOR NOTE

Marked as potential NTR for Innocence Week? Clearly something is up… but what? There’s way more than meets the eye in this scenario. (Hint: Make sure you go back to work at least once more after you’ve talked to Joanna/Dave).

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Come hang out at GreatN’s Hall of Terrible Women!
creator: Greatn
